name: OpenApiGenerationSetup
description: First-boot setup recipe used by tools/OpenApiClientGenerator to provision a Default tenant with the full OrchardCore.OpenApi API surface, matching the OpenApiGeneration recipe's feature list (src/OrchardCore.Modules/OrchardCore.OpenApi/Recipes/openapi-generation.recipe.json). Not intended for production sites.
author: The Orchard Core Team
